text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While on a walk one day, I happen to see a
familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff! B-bakushin! Bakushiiiin!
choice_data_list: Is that... Bakushin O's little sister?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The one and only! Hello! We're training for her
next Horsegirl Kids Footrace Meet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back to when I watched the Footrace Meet
the other day, recalling that Sakura Bakushin O's
sister didn't place as high as she'd hoped.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Finishing tenth really stuck with her. She's been
training hard ever since. Chasing the Bakushin, in
her words.
choice_data_list: Are you spotting for her too, Chiyono O?
Are you spotting for her too, Chiyono O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm friends with Bakushin O—we're in the
same club.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's how I got to know her sister. We cook
together sometimes, and she makes the most
amazing sweets! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! Still, something's off. She usually runs
faster than this.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna Bakushin... and become the ultimate
racer... just like my sister!
choice_data_list: You're right. Her running form is a little stiff.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Her form?! I see! I see?!
choice_data_list: Mind if I help out with this training session?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Would you?! In that case, since we're about to
break for lunch, I'd like your advice about her
regimen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Stomachs, full! Brains, picked! Time to get back
to train—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, no, hold that thought! Check out that
sign! "Face our fast-paced, full-on food
challenge"?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Fast-paced? That's the essence of Bakushin! As a
big sister, I've gotta step up and set a shining
example!
choice_data_list: But it says nobody's ever beaten the challenge!
But it says nobody's ever beaten the challenge!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: T-then I'd better Bakushin with you, Sis! Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A-are you sure about this?! Even a grown-up
Umamusume couldn't finish that much!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Don't listen to her! Let us rise to the challenge,
my dear sister! Our combined Bakushin will ensure
victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Their combined Bakushin did not ensure victory.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heh... It was a formidable opponent. But I won't stay down. Once I power up into my second and third forms, I'll go back for a rematch. Burp.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Eh-hehe... I couldn't even finish half of what you
managed...

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
My time's not improving either. It's hard to
Bakushin...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Sakura Bakushin O seems fine, her little
sister's glum mood starts to worry me. I rack my
brain for a way to cheer her up.
choice_data_list: Check it out! Those sweets look delicious!
Check it out! Those sweets look delicious!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um... I think more food is the last thing we need
right now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My suggestion falls flat.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but... don't they remind you of the sweets we
made that one time, Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Now that takes me back! You were such a
good teacher that it convinced me you'd grow up
to be a model class rep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You said it! But she's got more than just teaching
up her sleeve! Cleaning, laundry, sewing,
handicrafts—she can do it all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's like everything is a piece of cake for
her—even the stuff I don't excel at!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Aw, Big Sis! Delicate work's really not your strong
suit, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: AH!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! I know exactly what my little sister
needs!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: You do? What is it?! Tell me, tell me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In due time, sister of mine. But there's something I
must prepare first—alone!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Therefore, we're done for today! Class dismissed!
choice_data_list: Sure. Good luck with your mystery prep work!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for understanding! Now if you'll excuse
me, I'm off to get started!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There she goes... You think she'll really be okay
alone?
choice_data_list: She seemed to think so. Let's trust her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rest of us disperse, all of us wondering what
Sakura Bakushin O could be up to.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, I must decline! That's one thing I won't budge
on!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: No matter what, I have to do this by myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that for the sake of her sister's
improvement, Sakura Bakushin O must
accomplish this mission of hers alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, I hear word that her sister did
quite well in a recent competition.
